title: Social issues and society
explanation:
Social issues and society

  • poverty, homelessness, inequality, unemployment, charity
  • donate, volunteer, support, struggle
  • phrases: make a difference, raise awareness

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Many families are struggling because of rising ____. | *unemployment | luggage | humidity
The charity hopes to ____ awareness of the problem. | *raise | take | deliver
Volunteers collected food for people facing ____. | *homelessness | promotion | forecast
Even small actions can ____ a difference. | *make | do | take
questions.feedback: Make a difference is the fixed phrase.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: He decided to ____ money to the local shelter. | donate
More young people want to ____ in their communities. | volunteer
The campaign offers practical ____ to low-income families. | support
Some people still face serious social ____. | inequality
Many older people ____ to pay heating bills in winter. | struggle

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The event raised money for a children's ____. | *charity | platform | campaigner
The government promised to reduce child ____. | *poverty | virus | network
Neighbours created a stronger sense of ____ through the project. | *community | court | schedule
The new ____ provides emergency beds for rough sleepers. | *shelter | promotion | review
